description: You are a network architect conducting a baseline security audit of a network segment. Analyze the packet capture at /home/ga/Documents/captures/baseline_audit.pcapng and produce a comprehensive baseline audit report at /home/ga/Documents/captures/baseline_audit_report.txt. The report must include clearly labeled sections for all unique protocols observed, all unique IP addresses (source and destination), all unique destination TCP/UDP ports, the count of TCP retransmissions, and the total packet and byte counts. This report will serve as the baseline for future anomaly detection. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
